metadata.title: AE Labs — Automotive Electronic Solutions
metadata.description: Electronic and software solutions for the automotive industry. OEM, Tier 1/2, embedded software, engineering tools.

hero.title: Electronics at the heart of automotive
hero.subtitle: AE Labs designs the embedded software, engineering tools and hardware solutions that power tomorrow's vehicles.

pillars.title: Our expertise
pillars.subtitle: Three areas of excellence serving the automotive industry.

items.title: Embedded software
items.description: AUTOSAR, OSEK development, ECU management. ISO 26262 and ASPICE compliant for maximum functional safety.

items.title: Engineering tools
items.description: HIL/SIL test environments, calibration tools, OBD diagnostics. Accelerate your development cycles.

items.title: Hardware
items.description: Custom electronic boards, CAN/LIN/Ethernet interfaces, rapid prototyping solutions.

solutions.title: Our Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Embedded software, engineering tools and hardware solutions designed for the most demanding automotive requirements.

items.title: AEStack OS
items.description: AUTOSAR real-time operating system for high-performance ECUs. Compliant with ISO 26262 ASIL-D and ASPICE Level 3.

items.title: AETest Suite
items.description: Integrated HIL/SIL test platform for accelerated ECU validation. Automated test sequences and CI/CD integration.

items.title: AEConnect Gateway
items.description: Multi-protocol CAN/LIN/Ethernet/SOME-IP gateway for E/E architectures. Compatible with AUTOSAR adaptive and classic.

items.title: AEDiag SDK
items.description: UDS/OBD-II diagnostic SDK for embedded targets. ISO 14229 compliant, supports multi-ECU sessions.

items.title: AECal Studio
items.description: Real-time calibration and measurement tool for ECU parameters. ASAM MCD-2 MC (ASAP2) format support.

items.title: AEProto Board
items.description: Rapid prototyping board with MCU, CAN/LIN/Ethernet interfaces and safety mechanisms for automotive R&D.

about.title: About AE Labs
about.subtitle: 15 years engineering the electronics that power tomorrow's vehicles.
about.mission_body: AE Labs was founded with a single conviction: automotive electronics deserve the same level of precision and quality as the vehicles they power. Since 2009, we have supported OEMs and Tier 1/2 suppliers in building safer, smarter and more connected vehicles.

values.title: Precision
values.description: Every line of code, every circuit, every specification is crafted with engineering rigor.

values.title: Compliance
values.description: ISO 26262, ASPICE, MISRA — we design for the standards that protect lives.

values.title: Partnership
values.description: We integrate into your teams and processes. Your success is our deliverable.

team.name: Alexandre E.
team.bio: 15 years in automotive electronics. Former Bosch and Continental engineer.

team.name: Sophie M.
team.bio: Embedded systems expert. AUTOSAR architect for Tier 1 platforms.

team.name: Julien R.
team.bio: HIL/SIL specialist. Led validation programs for 40+ ECU projects.
